flags.message: The cell is marked forward and the event unresolved, but the provisioned snapshot contains only a case-termination entry and an opinion-cluster link while omitting the appellate issue, lower-court origin, briefing, and panel. This prevented issue-specific analysis.

The provisioned snapshot exposed indicators that a decision exists, but not its disposition. I did not follow the cluster link, seek this case's outcome, or use those indicators to choose the predicted direction.
